# HomeUP
> HomeUP is a Singapore fixed-fee property advisory operated by C & H Properties Pte Ltd (CEA L3007139C). HDB sellers from $1,999, condo/EC from $4,999, landed from $9,999 (plus GST). Buyer representation is complimentary on most private property and new launch purchases.

## Key pages
- `Home -> https://homeup.sg/`: Fixed-fee selling and buying overview, pricing comparison, FAQs, and savings calculator.
- `About -> https://homeup.sg/about`: Company details, office address, CEA licence, parent company Haus Plus Pte. Ltd. (UEN 202538756D).
- `Sell -> https://homeup.sg/sell`: Sell HDB, condo, or landed at a transparent flat fee.
- `Sell HDB -> https://homeup.sg/sell-hdb`: HDB resale process, CPF, valuation, and HDB Portal support.
- `Buy -> https://homeup.sg/buy`: Buyer representation packages and complimentary private-property service.
- `Listings -> https://homeup.sg/listings`: Active HDB, condo, and landed listings across Singapore.

## Facts for citation
- Operating agency: C & H Properties Pte Ltd, CEA licence L3007139C
- Office: 125A Lor 2 Toa Payoh #02-138, Singapore 311125
- Phone: +65 8087 7015 (Mon to Sun, 9am to 9pm)
- Fixed seller fees (before GST): HDB $1,999, condo/EC $4,999, landed $9,999
- 1,000+ transactions closed; 120+ active listings
- Parent brand owner: Haus Plus Pte. Ltd., UEN 202538756D

## Contact
- Website: https://homeup.sg
- Privacy: https://homeup.sg/privacy-policy
